passage.title: A Day with Must
passage.text: We must follow the rules. You must tell the truth. We must arrive on time. You must wear a seatbelt. He must be very tired. We must obey the law. You must study carefully. This must be true. We must fulfill our responsibility. You must not smoke.
passage.hindiTranslation: हमें नियमों का पालन करना चाहिए। तुम्हें सच बोलना ही चाहिए। हमें समय पर पहुँचना ही होगा। तुम्हें seatbelt लगाना ही चाहिए। उसे बहुत थका हुआ होगा। हमें कानून का पालन करना चाहिए। तुम्हें ध्यान से पढ़ना ही चाहिए। यह जरूर सच होगा। हमें अपनी जिम्मेदारी निभानी ही चाहिए। तुम्हें धूम्रपान नहीं करना चाहिए (मना है)।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "We must follow the..."?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "We must follow the rules."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "You must tell the..."?
options: You must complete your own work.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "You must tell the truth."

options: You must carry your ID card.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "We must arrive on time."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "You must wear a..."?
options: He must have worked very hard.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "You must wear a seatbelt."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He must be very..."?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "He must be very tired."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "We must obey the..."?
options: You must wait in the queue.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "We must obey the law."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "You must study carefully...."?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "You must study carefully."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "This must be true...."?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "This must be true."
